description: Perform a line-of-sight terrain assessment between Tower A (Sugarloaf Mountain, 40.0258°N, 105.4286°W) and Tower B (Flagstaff Mountain, 39.9878°N, 105.2931°W). Create placemarks named 'Tower_A_Sugarloaf' and 'Tower_B_Flagstaff', measure the path between them, and view the elevation profile. Save outputs: elevation profile screenshot to /home/ga/Documents/los_profile.png, KML with placemarks and path to /home/ga/Documents/microwave_link_analysis.kml, and a text report to /home/ga/Documents/los_report.txt containing path distance (km), terrain obstruction (YES/NO), and maximum terrain elevation (m).
